content.fact_text: Implementation of user domain data schemas and validation logic for the authentication module.

provenance_data.behaviour: Defines robust data validation schemas using Zod for user registration and profile management, including complex password enforcement. Provides TypeScript interfaces for internal database models and safe public-facing user objects, with utility functions for type conversion and schema validation.
provenance_data.utility: Provides strict, production-ready validation and type safety for user domain operations, ensuring data integrity before persistence.
